review_summary: Great Lotion for way less than $100!
review_text: I ordered this lotion from Amazon because there is no way I'm paying the $100-$125 most tanning salons charge for this(or any) lotion. It is a really rich, high moisture lotion with a really nice scent. I bought Phoenician because I don't like lotions that have colored bronzers that stain your clothes. This helps build a nice, even rich tan while keeping skin soft and supple. I like Designer Skin because their products have lots of anti-aging properties. One of the best things about Phoenician is that you don't have that strong "burnt" smell you get with lots of tanning lotions. I didn't feel like I had to run home and shower before I could even go to the grocery store. I have used several Designer Skin products over the years, but this is by far the best. I will definitely purchase it again before next the tanning season.

review_text: I'd first like to say, I love Brandon Carter. I've learned a lot from his YouTube videos, and when I saw him promoting this "fat-burner," I figured I'd give it a try to see if it would help me get somewhere near his shape. However, it seemed a little sketchy, the TeaRexx website doesn't work and after doing some research, I noticed the bottle is packaged in Forest Hills, NY which is where Brandon Carter's modelmayhem profile says he resides. Coincidence? If he is the one selling this or is getting endorsed to do so, it would've been nice if he admitted it. I mean his YT vids are free and nothing wrong with a man making some bucks, especially since he's given me a goal and tools to help me, but full disclosure is all I ask. Anyway, basically this has green tea extract, Vitamin C, Vitamin B3, B5, B6, B12, panax ginseng, and L-taurine. Let me also say I'm a doctor, and multi-vitamins have never been proven to provide any health benefit. So does the pill work? I get NO EFFECT from the pill, it gives me no extra energy. It gives me no jitteriness, nada, nada. I think you're better off drinking your own-made green tea. And there's lots of B vitamins in meat and whole grains. The B6 in one capsule is 40mg or 2000% your daily rec, and B12 is 8333%, and the bottle recommends 3 pills a day! The max recommended limit of B6 is 100mg/day from supplements, so 3 pills would be 120mg. I don't think this pill is dangerous, and maybe some people will feel more energy, but you could get B vitamins and green tea naturally for much cheaper than 50 a pill. Hope this helps you guys, I think the other reviews written here are shills. Lastly, still love you Brandon if you're reading this, and so I'm ok with the $40 donation for your vids.

review_text: SIZE: This chapstick holder is bigger than I expected. It's about half the size of a regular ID card. What adds the extra bulkiness is the plastic container inside. If you can overlook its size, then it's a pretty awesome item. COLOR: The color is darker in person, it doesn't look as bright as the picture. I think it looks better this way, since it doesn't look too kiddy. LEATHER: The leather is high quality. You can tell by the mild smell and the softness. OVERALL: I bought this product about two months ago, and it still looks great. I love it and I think it's worth the investment.

review_summary: They work well, but the smell is off-putting.
review_text: While I love that these flushable wipes are a more natural option than most, I just wish I could handle their aroma. Admittedly, I'm more sensitive to smells than most people. I would describe it as a sort of gamey, sickly sweet, citrus odor -- like citronella mixed with Smarties candies and bad car air-freshener. We kept them in the cabinet and the smell still took over the entire bathroom. Guests commented on it, and not in a good way. We used the package but did not buy more.

review_text: It does supply you with lasting energy to complete your workout, but it doesn't possess that intense rush of energy/focus that you usually experience when taking other energy supplements. It's a good product to take for a beginner or someone who wants more of a natural energy kick. Definitely not made for the daily gym rat who wants to lift heavy weight all day long. The taste is amazing, and the price of the product is fair. I wouldn't buy this again, but like I said. It's something a beginner lifter might enjoy.

review_text: I bought this for my boyfriend who does BeachBody workouts religiously. He mentioned wanting the pre workout, so I figured I'd be nice and surprise him. He tried it the first time, and the only bad thing he had to say about it was that it was a little bit chalky. Not sure if adding more water would help it or not? But he hasn't complained about it since. He said he feels energetic during his workouts now, and it only takes about 15 mins prior to kick in. Now that he's had it, I don't think he can ever do a workout without it anymore.

product_title: Body Ecology ASSIST SI SMALL INTESTINE 90 capsules
product_description: Assist-SI is a dietary supplement that maximizes your foods potential to nourish, energize, and heal! Although your small intestine is something you may not give much thought to, its the place where most of the digestion and absorption of your food occurs. If your small intestine isn't working, it really doesn't matter what you eat, since you won't be getting the nutrients you need. You're not getting the full value from your food; plain and simple. If your small intestine isn't in balance it will not provide any of the health and wellness payoffs you're hoping for simply because your small intestine isn't in balance. If the small intestine is not functioning optimally, precious nutrients from your food will leave your body in the form of waste. Many digestive enzyme products only assist the digestive process as it occurs in the stomach. Because ph and acid levels in the stomach are different than those in the small intestine, these products essentially stop working when they enter the small intestine, where the ph level is much higher. Body Ecology has created a new digestive aid specifically designed to protect and enhance the function of your small intestine. ASSIST SI is a super pancreatic enzyme that turns your small intestine into a digestion powerhouse to quickly absorb proteins, fats, and carbohydrates while detoxifying and toning the small intestine, ensuring nutrient-rich blood and happy, healthy cells. Why is it important to take a pancreatin supplement? Healthy intestinal function and a balanced intestinal environment are essential to overall health and resistance to disease. But achieving this can be challenging. The pancreas, a small gland located near the stomach, is responsible for producing digestive enzymes and hormones that regulate blood sugar. Due to diets high in mineral depleted food, cooked food, and sugar and stressful living, the pancreas becomes overtaxed and unable to complete its function.

I tried multiple different types before finding this one that actually works.

review_summary: I would avoid all herbals for HRT,
review_text: Transladies, I highly recommend avoiding this and similar products. Phytoestrogens and herbal supplements are NOT nearly as effective as prescription strength, bioidentical medications. They're not even in the same ballpark. I took pueraria mirifica and other herbals for over six months and saw virtually no effects whatsoever. When I eventually did get approved for HRT, I wasn't allowed to even begin taking the prescription media until the herbals were out of my system. Which meant a delay of several months. Once I DID begin on prescription HRT, the effects came VERY quickly and continue to this day. I don't want to besmirch any vendors, but the only folks who seem to benefit from these products are those who sell them.

product_title: Cellu-cup­ Anti-cellulite Vacuum Slimming (Transparent)
product_description: CHANGES COLORS WHEN THE DESIRED AREA HAS BEEN SUFFICIENTLY MASSAGED What is the Cellu-cup? Cellu-cup is simply a little massage tool made from silicone. Fully automatic (no power needed), it allows you to recreate at home and at your own pace, the famous "skin pinch and roll technique" from the Physiotherapist or the beauty therapist. You need to bear in mind that the "skin pinch and roll" technique is the only efficient technique recognized by professionals to fight cellulite. With its mechanical action, Cellu-cup helps the lipolysis (degradation of fat cells in the body) and removes the orange-peel effect from your skin. This technique is non-invasive and safe. It adapts to whatever the type of cellulite: fat, aqueous, mixed or fibrous. Unbreakable and portable so you can take it anywhere. You may well have understood, cellulite leads to the formation of clusters of adipocytes. As long as these groups remain grouped together, it will be impossible to eliminate them. With the Cellu-cup massage and its reproduction of the skin pinch and roll technique, you will deconstruct these clusters. As the massages continue, these clusters of adipocytes will reduce. The fat cells will be released and therefore used by your body. The excess fat is converted into energy: it is the lipolysis (breakdown of fat). Furthermore, the adipocytes don't compress the blood and lymph vessels and water, collagen, oxygen ... all flow better. Your skin recovers its elasticity! Cellu-cup was founded on the collaboration of a user and a therapist.

review_summary: So far very happy with purchase. If it hurts, decrease suction, if it doesn't hurt at all, increase suction!
review_text: So far I am very happy with this purchase. My body type is considered " skinny fat". I started seeing cellulite last year and it is now starting to show more. I'm sure depending on how bad your cellulite is, your results will be different. I have been using it for 3 days about 15 minutes each leg, or longer because it is very addicting! You have to make sure you have enough suction to be increasing the circulation. It hurts on certain areas of my legs where my cellulite is worse! I like to think that is a good thing. I start out with little suction and then continue to increase the suction. Also, in difficult areas will go slower and leave it there for a few minutes. You also have to be careful when you're sliding it around that you don't lose suction, depending on how you're holding it. You don't want to be squeezing it while moving because you will lose suction. I honestly already notice a difference in my skin. But I am still sceptical. I plan on updating my review after a month or so.

review_summary: this was nothing like what I thought it was
review_text: Unfortunately, this was nothing like what I thought it was. It comes in 2 pieces. One piece goes on the border and the other piece is a plate that slides in. It took a while to get it to finally fit right onto my phone. By that time, the volume buttons kept interfering with each other. Basically, pressing the volume down button would also cause the volume to increase after it decreases. The back plate causes the case to also have rough edges, making the phone very uncomfortable. The back plate is reflective to the point where you could use it as a mirror, but it is also very warped, so you would be better using your face camera as a mirror. There is also nothing keeping the back plate from sliding out. The pieces are basically cheap plastic with an aluminum side and it doesn't even look like it will protect my phone that well. Very unsatisfied with this purchase. I do not recommend buying this.
